name: GIR Natureview Resorts Limited
summary: GIR Natureview Resorts Limited provides services related to hospitality, travel, and leisure sectors in India. The company plans and executes small to medium hospitality projects primarily for service apartments, small hotels, and resorts, as well as renovates and redesigns existing hotels, resorts, or service apartments. Its portfolios of services include concept development, design consultancy, and project development, as well as heating, ventilating, and air conditioning planning and plumbing, and electrical work. The company also plans and participates in various events/exhibitions/trade fairs; and undertakes contracts for maintenance of service apartments. GIR Natureview Resorts Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Mumbai, India.
